# GKE Spot Autoscale Template
> GKE Cluster with Spot Instances and Cluster Autoscaler
## Architecture
This template demonstrates how to use GKE Spot Instances with Cluster Autoscaler for cost-effective workloads.
## Deployment Paths
### Path 1: Terraform + Helm
### Path 2: Config Connector (KCC)
